title: grindelia inuloides var. inuloides
intro: Grindelia inuloides var. inuloides, a perennial herb native to North America, is a member of the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as gumweed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Its medicinal properties include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations, providing health benefits such as alleviating colds, flu, and bronchitis. Grindelia inuloides var. inuloides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
